title: AI Doom vs Boom, EA Cult Returns, BBB Upside, US Steel and Golden Votes
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros!

(1:25) The AI Doomer Ecosystem: goals, astroturfing, Biden connections, effective altruist rebrand, global AI regulation

(25:17) Doom vs Boom in AI: Job Destruction or Abundance?

(52:44) Big, Beautiful Bill cleanup and upside: DOGE angle, CBO issues

(1:17:14) US Steel/Nippon Steel deal: national champions and golden votes

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses AI doom vs boom, the Effective Altruist cult, Big Beautiful Bill cleanup, and the US Steel/Nippon Steel deal. They debate the potential consequences of AI on jobs and the economy. The hosts also touch on the Biden administration's AI executive order and its focus on DEI.

takeaways.text: AI could cause significant job destruction
The AI doomer ecosystem has connections to the Biden administration
The Big Beautiful Bill has potential for cleanup and upside
The US Steel/Nippon Steel deal was blocked by Biden citing national security
The hosts are skeptical of the Effective Altruist movement
The Biden administration's AI executive order prioritizes DEI
The hosts discuss the potential for AI to increase abundance

sentiment.notes: The hosts are cautious about the potential consequences of AI and the Biden administration's AI executive order. They are also skeptical of the Effective Altruist movement.

notable_moments.description: The hosts start discussing AI doom vs boom
The hosts discuss the US Steel/Nippon Steel deal
